rationale: Educ. Code §43.011 governs refunding of defaulted school bonds and references taxable valuation as determined by tax rolls. It does not set or depend on the homestead exemption amount; reduced taxable valuation from the proposed change is absorbed by existing valuation references.
quote: the full proceeds of a 50-cent tax levy on the $100 of all taxable valuation of property in the district
_note: No direct conflict. The statute references taxable valuation as determined by existing tax rolls, which already incorporate whatever exemptions are in effect. The proposed homestead exemption increase would indirectly reduce taxable valuations but does not contradict any operative provision of §43.011.
